seo.title: Alison Haire · AI Product Leader, Builder & Operator
seo.description: Alison Haire (Ally) — translating frontier AI into products, strategy and story. Founder of Lilypad; prev. Protocol Labs, IBM, Accenture.

hero.eyebrow: AI Product Leader · Builder · Seasoned Operator
hero.lead: Founder and product leader with 8+ years building AI infrastructure, from AIOps at Accenture to a distributed AI compute network running verifiable inference across thousands of GPU nodes worldwide. Published researcher in GPU verification. Founder of Lilypad; prev. Protocol Labs, IBM, Accenture.

bio.headline: I take research-grade AI and turn it into things people can use, buy, and believe in.
paragraphs: I live at the seam between research and reality. For eight-plus years I have taken the bleeding edge of AI and infrastructure and shipped it: most recently as founder and CEO of Lilypad, a decentralised GPU compute network for verifiable, trustless AI inference at scale.

I started by owning a café for seven years, taught myself to code, and went Accenture → IBM → Protocol Labs → Lilypad. That path taught me the hardest part of frontier technology is rarely the technology. It is the translation: scoping what is buildable now, shipping it reliably, and telling the story that makes engineers, executives and markets move together.

interests.headline: The human stuff.
interests.body: I am endlessly curious about how minds, biological and artificial, actually work. When I am not shipping, I am reading sci-fi, thinking about robotics and the philosophy of AI, writing, and chasing a properly good cup of coffee. The café is where this whole thing started.
